all.en: Open enrollment for the new benefits plan year begins on November first.
all.zh: 新福利計畫年度的公開加保自十一月一日開始。

all.en: All employees must review their elections before the deadline of November twentieth.
all.zh: 所有員工必須在十一月二十日截止前檢視個人選擇。

all.en: This guide explains the major options available across health and wellness plans.
all.zh: 本指南說明健康與身心福祉計畫提供的主要選項。

all.en: Medical coverage now includes three tiers with different deductible and premium levels.
all.zh: 醫療保障現提供三種等級，自負額與保費各不相同。

all.en: The basic tier offers low premiums and higher out of pocket maximums.
all.zh: 基本等級保費較低，自付上限較高。

all.en: The premium tier covers most specialist visits with very small copayments.
all.zh: 尊榮等級對多數專科門診僅收取極低的部分負擔。

all.en: Dental and vision plans remain optional and may be added independently.
all.zh: 牙科與眼科計畫仍為自由選擇，可獨立加保。

all.en: Flexible spending accounts allow pretax savings for healthcare and dependent care.
all.zh: 彈性支出帳戶可將稅前金額存入，支付醫療與扶養照護。

all.en: Annual contribution limits have been raised in line with new federal guidelines.
all.zh: 年度提撥上限已依新版聯邦規範向上調整。

all.en: Retirement savings matching has increased from four percent to five percent.
all.zh: 退休儲蓄相對提撥比例已自百分之四提高至百分之五。

all.en: Employees should review beneficiary designations during this enrollment window.
all.zh: 員工應於本次加保期間檢視受益人指定資料。

all.en: Life insurance coverage remains available at one or two times annual salary.
all.zh: 壽險保障維持一倍或兩倍年薪兩種額度可選。

all.en: Supplemental disability insurance can be purchased at group discounted rates.
all.zh: 附加失能保險可依團體折扣費率投保。

all.en: A new mental health support program has been added at no employee cost.
all.zh: 新增的身心健康支持方案不向員工收取任何費用。

all.en: Wellness rewards continue to provide gift cards for completing annual screenings.
all.zh: 健康獎勵方案持續提供完成年度健檢的禮券回饋。

all.en: Decision support tools are available on the internal benefits portal.
all.zh: 內部福利入口網提供決策輔助工具供員工使用。

all.en: Employees may compare side by side costs based on personal usage patterns.
all.zh: 員工可依個人使用情境，並列比較各方案成本。

all.en: Virtual information sessions will run every Tuesday and Thursday this month.
all.zh: 線上說明會本月每週二與週四舉行。

all.en: Recorded versions will remain available on demand for thirty days.
all.zh: 錄影版本將以隨選方式保留三十天供觀看。

all.en: Failure to complete elections will result in default coverage at last year levels.
all.zh: 未完成選擇者將以去年方案作為預設保障。

all.en: Changes outside this window require a qualifying life event to take effect.
all.zh: 本期間以外的異動需具備合格生活事件方可生效。

all.en: Human resources representatives are available for one on one consultations.
all.zh: 人力資源同仁可提供一對一諮詢服務。

all.en: Please contact the benefits team early if you require translation support.
all.zh: 如需翻譯協助，請及早聯繫福利團隊。

all.en: We encourage every employee to choose coverage that fits their personal needs.
all.zh: 鼓勵每位員工選擇最符合個人需求的保障方案。
